title: Implementing a High-Performance Redis-Based Cache for Real-Time User Data
statement: Design a robust backend API that leverages Redis as a high-performance cache for real-time user data. The API should handle GET requests to fetch user data, POST requests to update user data, and DELETE requests to remove user data. Implement a basic authentication mechanism using a JSON Web Token (JWT) and validate user inputs to prevent potential security vulnerabilities. Your API should be capable of handling a high volume of concurrent requests while maintaining data consistency across Redis and your in-memory data store.
constraints: Must use Redis as the primary cache store for user data
Must implement basic authentication using JWT
Must validate user inputs for potential security vulnerabilities
Must handle a high volume of concurrent requests while maintaining data consistency

endpoints.description: Fetch user data by user ID
Remove user data by user ID
